heading: For industry
subhead: A completed feature screenplay — available on request.
comps: [PENDING: in the vein of X meets Y]
bio: Meher Yar Khan is completing his debut novel, *They Only Came When It Rained* — a quiet, contemplative literary novel set in a small Japanese commuter station café, about people who can't move on and the late-shift barista who keeps them company on the nights it rains (coming August 2026). His screenwriting includes a psychological thriller — a separate work that shares the novel's atmospheric precision and its interest in two selves, the light and the shadow that live in one person. The novel comes first; the screen extends the range.
